# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.

Prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security


parameters: 
 - name: vnetName   # Name of the Virtual Network (VNet) to use, e.g., "MyVNET"   
 - name: location     # Location for all resources in VNet and Azure SQL Server     
 - name: subnetPrefix  # Subnets will be created with this prefix inside your vnet  
 - name: storageAccountName       # Name of the Storage Account to use, e.g., "mystorage"   
 - name: sqlServerName          # The server 'name' for SQL Server deployment     
 - name: publicIpAddressId        # Public IP address resource id    
  
variables: 
- name: vnetID           # Variable to hold the VNet ID, e.g., "myvnet"   
- name: subnetPrefix1       # Subnets will be created with this prefix inside your vnet     
- name: storageAccountId     # Storage Account resource id  
 -name:'sqlServerID'          # SQL Server Resource Id 
 -name : 'publicIpAddressResourceGroup'    # Public IP address group for resources, e.g., "mypublicip"      
resources:     
- type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks     # Define the Virtual Network resource  
parameters(location)         
variables (vnetID=concat('myVNET', parameters('subnetPrefix')))       
  - name : vnetName          
    value = variables ('vnetId')     
- type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets     # Define the Subnetwork resource  
parameters(location, subnetPrefix1)         
variables (SubnetID=concat('myVNET', parameters('subnetPrefix')))       
  - name : vnetId          
    value = variables ('vnetid')     
- type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts     # Define the Storage Account resource  
parameters(location)         
variables (storageAccountID=concat('mystorage', parameters('subnetPrefix')))       
  - name : storageaccountName          
    value = variables ('storageAccountId')     
- type: Microsoft.Sql/servers     # Define the SQL Server resource  
parameters(location)         
variables (sqlServerID=concat('myserver','', parameters('subnetPrefix')))       
  - name : sqlserverName          
    value = variables ('sqlsrvId')     
- type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses     # Define the Public IP Address resource  
parameters(location)         
variables (PublicIpID=concat('mypublicip', parameters('subnetPrefix')))       
  - name : publicIpaddressid          
    value = variables ('publicIpId')     
- type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets     # Define the Subnetwork resource  
parameters(location, subnetPrefix1)         
variables (SubnetID=concat('myVNET', parameters('subnetPrefix')))       
  - name : vnetId          
    value = variables ('vnetid')

    value = variables ('vnetId')     
- type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks     # Define the Virtual Network resource  
parameters(location)
